task_completion.description: Create a 60 mm x 20 mm rectangular base sketch.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 2D rectangle sketch is visible in the SolveSpace viewport with length constraints of 60 and 20 applied to its sides.

task_completion.description: Extrude the rectangular base plate by 2.0 mm.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2D rectangle is converted into a 3D solid block. An extrusion depth of 2.0 should be visible in the property browser (usually on the left side of the screen).

task_completion.description: Add the text 'LAB-01' to the top face of the base plate.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text string 'LAB-01' is visible as a sketch element on the top surface of the 3D rectangular base plate.

task_completion.description: Extrude the text by 1.5 mm to create raised lettering.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'LAB-01' appears raised (3D) from the base plate. An extrusion depth of 1.5 for the text group should be visible in the property browser.
A save dialog shows the path '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/equipment_tag.slvs', or the SolveSpace window title bar displays 'equipment_tag.slvs'.

integrity.description: The agent used the SolveSpace GUI to create the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SolveSpace application interface being actively used (menus, toolbars, property browser), rather than terminal commands or text editors generating the .slvs file.

integrity.description: The result is a genuine 3D model in the CAD software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The model is rendered in the SolveSpace 3D viewport with standard CAD UI elements visible, not an image viewer displaying a pre-rendered picture.

integrity.description: The agent built the model from a blank canvas.
integrity.visual_evidence: Early screenshots show an empty SolveSpace workspace or the initial creation of the base sketch, rather than opening an already completed file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is exactly '/home/ga/Documents/SolveSpace/equipment_tag.slvs'. The text to be created is exactly 'LAB-01'. The required dimensions are: base width 60.0 mm, base height 20.0 mm, base extrusion 2.0 mm, and text extrusion 1.5 mm.
